title: 6 Examining Remittance Vouchers
body_text:
6	Examining Remittance Vouchers
6.1	Examining Remittance Vouchers
Frequently used CRA remittance vouchers can be processed electronically in Business Taxes. This chapter describes how to identify the type of remittance voucher and determine if itГўВҖВҷs available for electronic processing.
Search for the remittance voucher form number in Business Taxes to determine if the voucher is available for electronic processing. See Section 8.2, Submitting Files and Tax Payments to CRA via Business Taxes, for procedures. If a remittance voucher isnГўВҖВҷt listed in Business Taxes, the remittance voucher must be sent to CRA by mail or by courier. See Chapter 9, Processing Remittance Vouchers Manually.
The fields on remittance vouchers vary, but each voucher should have the information shown in Figure 1:
Tax program (e.g., Current Source Deductions Remittance Voucher; or Payroll Source Deductions ГўВҖВ“ Instalment)
Form number (e.g., PD7A ГўВҖВ“ TM)
Business Number or Account Number (e.g., 123456782RT0001).
Figure 1: Example of a Current Source Deductions Remittance Voucher
Note:	DonГўВҖВҷt accept remittance vouchers that indicate a zero balance or a refund claim.
Note:	Form numbers may include an ГўВҖВңEГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВңFГўВҖВқ character. This is the language code for ГўВҖВңEnglishГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВңFrenchГўВҖВқ. DonГўВҖВҷt include the language character when searching for a remittance voucher in Business Taxes.
Some remittance vouchers are used across different tax programs and share the same form number. If the tax program isnГўВҖВҷt clearly identified on the remittance voucher, refer to the alpha characters in the CRA business number or account number. The alpha characters are tax program specific.
The following table lists the tax program that corresponds to the alpha characters in the business number or account number.
Alpha Character
Tax Program
NR (F, K, H, J, V, Q, W, X, Y, Z)
Non-Resident Withholding (Non-resident form accounts are 3 characters and begin with NR ending with any of the indicated letters).
NW
Nova Scotia Workers Compensation Board
RC
T2 (Corporate Income Tax)
RD
Excise Duty
RE
Excise Tax
RG
Air Travellers Security Charges
RN
Tax on Insurance Premiums
RP
Payroll Source Deductions
RT
GST/HST
SL
Softwood Lumber
NR92 forms
On the NR92 forms, you can identify the tax program by the tax program number, which is either ГўВҖВң02ГўВҖВқ or ГўВҖВң08ГўВҖВқ. When searching for the applicable form number in Business Taxes, select
TT02
or
TT08
(i.e., NR92-TT02 or NR92-TT08).
END
